name: MeteoHeroes
overview: Fulmen, Nix, Nubess, Pluvia, Thermo and Ventum are six ordinary kids who discover that they have extraordinary powers: they can control the weather! With the help of the Meteo Expert Center (aka the MEC) located on the Gran Sasso mountain in Italy, they learn to handle their superpowers and to use them to solve the challenges our planet faces every day –. And of course, as well as learning what it means to be superheroes, these kids have to face everyday challenges all youngsters face: handling friendships and differences, teaming and growing up – all while saving Planet Earth!.
